# When you write a real leaf in {boxLib}/grains/, add its qualified name
# below.  The codegen reads this file at every run and skips the listed
# leaves when emitting GrainStubs.cpp -- so re-running genGrains.py no
# longer reintroduces stubs that conflict with hand-written definitions.
# Format: one entry per non-comment line, shape `<box-namespace>::<leaf>`.
# 2026-06-05 -- LDQP/STQP renamed to _vms (rows are S_PalVms-only per
# AARM C-15; unsuffixed names silently fell back to generated stubs ->
# OPCDEC -> SRM vector-420 crash in show config / getbit64).
